case_title: LEIGH G. FLEMING VS. ROBERT R. BRYAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLEMING, LEIGH G. AS TO DEFENDANT BRYAN, ROBERT R. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT R. BRYAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
